properties.name: firebase.service-account
properties.description: Classpath filename for the Firebase service account JSON (or use FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT env var).

properties.name: firebase.project-id
properties.description: Firebase project id used when initializing the SDK.

properties.name: firebase.default-health1
properties.description: Default health for pokemon 1 when creating a new battle.

properties.name: firebase.default-health2
properties.description: Default health for pokemon 2 when creating a new battle.
